title: Tamil Nadu Public Service Commission (Additional Functions) Rule, 2022
heading: 1. Short Title
text: 1. Short title.- These Rules may be called the Tamil Nadu Public Service Commission (Additional Functions) Rules, 2022

title: Tamil Nadu Public Service Commission (Additional Functions) Rule, 2022
heading: 2. Definitions
text: 2. Definitions.- (1) In these Rules, unless the context otherwise requires,- (a) “Act ” means the Tamil Nadu Public Service Commission (Additional Functions) Act, 2022 (Tamil Nadu Act 14 of 2022); (b) “Form” means a Form appended to these rules; (2) Words and expressions used in these Rules, but not defined, shall have the meaning assigned to them in the Act.

title: Tamil Nadu Public Service Commission (Additional Functions) Rule, 2022
heading: 3. Form of Requisition
text: 3. Form of Requisition.- An organization, for recruitment of candidates for appointment to posts in that organisation, shall submit requisition to the Commission in Form A along with the ‘Estimate of Vacancies’, as prepared in Form B.
